## Question

Which event and provenance fields are minimally sufficient to estimate descriptive discovery diagnostics and test latent-copying recovery in seeded canonical sessions?

## Scope

Version the session/actor/time/action/source/score/outcome ontology, missingness representation, matching-error model, and estimator targets before generating data. Include privacy and real-data review gates. This task makes no empirical claim.

## Completion test

The schema validates good/bad fixtures, documents field semantics and missingness, and maps every proposed estimator to its required observables and synthetic ground truth.
